heading: Omitted
label: 21 to 27 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 21 to 27, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 21, , , provided for organization and administration of Territory of Alaska.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 137 Stat. 512Section 22, , , directed that Capital of Territory be at Juneau.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 237 Stat. 512Section 23, , , extended Constitution and laws of United States to Territory.act Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 337 Stat. 512Section 24, acts , ; , title III, § 301(c), , limited authority of Territorial legislature to repeal or amend existing laws.Aug. 24, 1912, ch. 387, § 337 Stat. 512July 28, 1956, ch. 77270 Stat. 713Section 25, , , empowered Attorney General to prescribe fees of officers not otherwise compensated.act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 3031 Stat. 332Section 26, , , authorized governor to appoint notaries public.act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 231 Stat. 321Section 27, , , validated appointments of notaries public made prior to .act June 6, 1900, ch. 786, § 231 Stat. 321June 6, 1900
